name: extract_text_from_screenshot
description:
Extract and recognize text from screenshots using advanced OCR capabilities.

Use this tool ONLY when the user has a screenshot containing text and wants to extract it.
This tool specializes in OCR for code, terminal output, documentation, and general text extraction.

Do NOT use for: UI design conversion, error diagnosis, or diagram understanding.

image_source.description: Local file path or remote URL to the image

prompt.description: Instructions for text extraction. Specify what type of text to extract and any formatting requirements.

programming_language.description: Optional: specify the programming language if the screenshot contains code (e.g., 'python', 'javascript', 'java'). Leave empty for auto-detection or non-code text.
